HomeDestinationsKolakham
West Bengal

Kolakham

Where Kanchenjunga Smiles at You

The mighty Kanchenjunga fills the sky, snow glittering like diamonds against impossible blue.

4.5
(98 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
19°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Kolakham

Kolakham offers one of the closest and most stunning views of Mt. Kanchenjunga, surrounded by rhododendron forests and village life.

A remote village that has become a favorite among trekkers and photographers for its close-up views of Kanchenjunga.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
2,000 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.5 (98 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
